aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Smart Residential Services Inc. for local HVAC queries due to strong NAP consistency and some authority signals, but lack of rich schema and conversational content limits their visibility.

Expand FAQ content to address common HVAC queries in Torrance.

critical_issues: No recent posts or Q&A engagement.

action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
